description_long: This is a modern, luxury bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, surrounded by lush green landscaping and tall palm trees. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, multiple balconies, and an expansive outdoor area with a swimming pool and sun loungers. The front includes a driveway with a parked car and a covered entrance, while the rear showcases a spacious patio and poolside relaxation area. The building is primarily white with glass accents, and the layout is open, with visible interior furnishings such as beds and seating. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing privacy and a sense of exclusivity. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open space, natural light, and outdoor living.
description: A modern, white luxury bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a swimming pool, and lush landscaping with palm trees. The design is open and contemporary, emphasizing outdoor living and natural light.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the side, highlighting the swimming pool, sun loungers, and a large patio area with palm trees and open green space.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and a row of palm trees lining the property.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the private backyard, additional patio space, and the pool area with more palm trees.
description_view_3: View 3 emphasizes the pool, sun loungers, and the rear of the bungalow, with a clear view of the outdoor relaxation area and surrounding landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
